fragments: [INFERENCE] Selected APIs: Maps JavaScript API, Places API (New), Geocoding API, Directions API (Legacy).
[DOC] `Advanced Markers`: Advanced Markers support customizable markers, keyboard/click interaction, and require a map ID.
[CODE] `browser-maps-key` runtime `browser` uses `http_referrers` and APIs: Maps JavaScript API.
[INFERENCE] Directions API is Legacy, so new production builds should evaluate newer routing services before final implementation.
